name: Lemon Spritz Cookies
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. Prepare a baking sheet with cooking spray. In a mixing bowl, combine margarine, lemon juice, and lemon peel. In another mixing bowl, combine flour, powdered sugar, and salt. Mix wet ingredients with dry ingredients just until moistened. Spoon dough into a cookie press with fitted template of desired shape. Press cookies 2 inches apart onto prepared baking sheets. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes, or until golden brown.
